contents:
# PH Ambassador meets ROK Deputy Minister to strengthen diplomacy and law enforcement cooperation

## Overview
Philippine Ambassador Bernadette Therese C. Fernandez met ROK Deputy Minister Lim Sang-Woo at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs. They discussed enhancing public diplomacy, consular affairs, and law enforcement cooperation between the Philippines and South Korea.

## Details
The meeting occurred on April 27, 2026. Lim Sang-Woo serves as Deputy Minister for Public Diplomacy and Government Representative for Consular Affairs. This follows related consular aid on April 26, 2026, when the Migrant Workers Office provided KRW 13,740,000 to 11 distressed Overseas Filipino Workers for fire incidents and medical cases. Each received KRW 1,250,000 under the AKSYON Fund. No specific quotes from the meeting remained detailed.

**Location**: Seoul, South Korea

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @jkgarokgov, which covers ROK government affairs, defense policy, official statements. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following ROK government affairs will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
